title: The Crew Leaves the Island
description: On pages 7–10, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is the crew leaves the island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Don't be stupid!! I'm the captain!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Nami-San's so cute when she's terrified!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Heehee ... you're so funny, Sanji- Chan!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: My people will pray for your safety!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Quite, quite!! We'll become so amazing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Heheh!! I look forward to it!!

summary: The Crew Leaves the Island. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
